generated_oml:
instance BcsSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor component in Building Control System"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HonoDittoDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingSystemActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting system controlled via Eclipse Ditto device with policy-based validation for brightness (0-100%) and color temperature (Kelvin)"
]

instance HonoDittoDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BcsSensor
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data integration via Eclipse Hono (at-least-once delivery) and Eclipse Ditto (policy-based validation for value ranges)"
]

instance SensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data from physical building systems"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HonoDittoDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeDataExchangeEnabler
]

instance RealTimeDataExchangeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange and policy-based validation"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, LightControlService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering framework for transforming enriched BIM models into DT artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMModelTransformationService
]

instance UE5InteractiveVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive visualization and real-time synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance ModularArchitectureEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points for custom services"
    DTDFVocab:enables CustomServiceIntegrationService
]

instance DittoControllerMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DittoController middleware for message brokering between UE5 and physical devices"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance LightControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TwinComponent and FeatureParser extensions for light control behavior"
    DTDFVocab:enables LightControlService
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Enriched BIM model with device-specific metadata (e.g., Revit photometric values for lighting)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringFramework
]

instance LightBehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LightTwinComponent and LightFeatureParser for processing brightness and color temperature"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LightControlEnabler
]

instance BIMModelTransformationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated transformation of BIM models into DT artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:provides BIMModelTransformationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring and interactive visualization for Facility Managers"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight, BuildingControlAction
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for infrastructure optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveAnalyticsInsight
]

instance ControlLogicConfigurationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Control logic configuration by Building Control Engineers"
    DTDFVocab:provides ConfigureControlLogicAction
]

instance CustomServiceIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Custom service integration via modular extensions for DT Engineers"
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomServiceExtensionInsight
]

instance LightControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Light control configuration and management"
    DTDFVocab:provides LightControlAction
]

instance BIMModelTransformationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Transformed BIM model artifacts for digital twin"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of building operations for Facility Managers"
]

instance BuildingControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote control of building systems via interactive visualization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for infrastructure optimization"
]

instance ConfigureControlLogicAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Configuration of building control logic by engineers"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance CustomServiceExtensionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Custom analytics services integrated via modular extensions"
]

instance LightControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting lighting brightness and color temperature"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building within AECO domain with BCS components"
    base:contains BcsSensor, LightingSystemActuator, BcsController
]

instance BcsController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Controller component in Building Control System"
]

instance DTFramework : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Centralized DT Framework acting as hub for bidirectional data exchange"
    base:contains BuildingControlEngineerRole, FacilityManagerRole, DTEngineerRole
]

instance BuildingControlEngineerRole : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Role for device modeling and control logic configuration"
]

instance FacilityManagerRole : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Role for real-time monitoring and control of building operations"
]

instance DTEngineerRole : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Role for service integration and extension via modular points"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands issued by Facility Managers via interactive visualization interfaces enable bidirectional data exchange for real-time control actions; however, command types, message formats, validation mechanisms, feedback systems, conflict resolution, and execution confirmation details are not specified in the documents."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points for integrating custom services and analytics, runtime configuration management enabling adjustments without full redeployment, and a central DT Framework facilitating holistic building lifecycle management through scalable and interoperable component integration."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The framework supports the complete DT lifecycle from initial device modeling within BIM environments (defining sensors, actuators, controllers), through Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) for structured representation extraction and automatic artifact generation, real-time data synchronization for operational monitoring and control, and modular evolution via custom services integrated by DT Engineers. Stakeholder roles (Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, DT Engineers) are defined for respective lifecycle phases, but governance approaches are not explicitly detailed."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is ensured through accurate rendering of BIM metadata (e.g., Revit photometric values for lighting in UE5 scene rendering). Validation includes Eclipse Ditto's policy-based checks for sensor data ranges/units and pre-execution validation of actuator commands to prevent unsafe operations. Fault tolerance mechanisms—Eclipse Hono's at-least-once message delivery and Ditto's persistent event storage—maintain data integrity and resilience against network failures, ensuring synchronization and operational safety between physical assets and the Digital Twin."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical infrastructure utilizes Eclipse Hono and Ditto for bidirectional communication; however, network topology, bandwidth, latency requirements, redundancy mechanisms, and security protocols are not detailed in the provided documents."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployment leverages a modular architecture with automated processes for reproducible setups and runtime configuration management to support scalability and adaptability; however, specific hosting platforms, computational/storage requirements, and deployment models are not detailed in the documents."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with Building Information Modeling (BIM) standards and external systems through bidirectional data exchange, addressing interoperability across heterogeneous systems as part of non-functional requirements; specific data exchange protocols and schemas are not detailed in the provided documents."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework utilizes BIM as an AECO-specific standard for device modeling but does not explicitly reference additional industry standards, specifications, or interoperability protocols. Compliance frameworks and certification requirements are not detailed in the documents."
]
